mapper.select: SELECT repair_type AS repairType, COUNT(*) AS count FROM ht_repair WHERE company_id = #{companyId} AND is_delete = 0 GROUP BY repair_type

SELECT r.id, r.repair_no, r.repair_type, r.repair_time, r.repair_status, r.room_num, r.meter_id, r.in_temp, r.out_temp, r.room_temp FROM ht_repair r WHERE r.house_id = #{roomId} AND r.is_delete = 0 ORDER BY r.repair_time DESC
